channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Commentator faces backlash for mistakenly calling A$AP Rocky 'AKA Rocky' during live commentary
item.description: The incident occurred when a commentator incorrectly referred to A$AP Rocky as 'AKA Rocky,' sparking online mockery and criticism. This mix-up highlights the importance of accuracy in public-facing ro...

item.title: Avengers: Doomsday Trailer Teases Epic Battle with Doctor Doom and Marvel's Biggest Ensemble Cast
item.description: Marvel has released the first official trailer for Avengers: Doomsday, setting the stage for the MCU's most anticipated battle yet. The action-packed preview showcases a massive ensemble cast includin...

item.title: Zandile Gumede's political shift and eThekwini mayoral candidacy under scrutiny
item.description: The uMkhonto weSizwe Party (MKP) in KwaZulu-Natal is awaiting final approval from party leader Jacob Zuma and Secretary-General Sibonelo Nomvalo on whether Zandile Gumede will be their mayoral candida...

item.title: New UK PM Andy Burnham reshapes government with cabinet overhaul and economic reforms
item.description: New UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham has taken charge, immediately restructuring his predecessor's cabinet to signal a shift in leadership. The 56-year-old Labour leader, who became PM after replacing K...

item.title: Police Brutality During Student Protest Sparks Outcry
item.description: The article details the violent dispersal of a peaceful student-led march organized by the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) towards Parliament on July 20, 2026. The protest, initially aimed at protesting e...

item.title: ASEAN diplomats address regional tensions amid US-Iran conflict and Myanmar crisis
item.description: The 11-member Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) and its major partners, including the US, China, India, Japan, and South Korea, are convening in Manila to tackle pressing regional issues....

item.title: Legal Terms Explained in VP Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial
item.description: The article provides an explanation of key legal terms used during the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. Terms like 'prima facie' refer to sufficient evidence supporting a claim, while...

item.title: Avengers: Doomsday Trailer Reveals Doctor Doom and Avengers' New Threat
item.description: The first trailer for Avengers: Doomsday has been released, featuring Chris Evans as Captain America and Robert Downey Jr. in his iconic role as Doctor Doom. Directed by the Russo brothers, the film b...

item.title: Monsoon Season Brings Record Rainfall and Flooding to South Asia
item.description: The monsoon season has brought unprecedented rainfall to South Asia, leading to severe flooding in several regions. Countries like India, Bangladesh, and Nepal are experiencing widespread devastation,...

item.title: Delft officers intervene to rescue infant from drunk father during traffic stop
item.description: Law enforcement officers in Delft intervened to rescue an infant from its intoxicated father during a routine traffic stop late Sunday evening. The officers noticed a man carrying a distressed baby, w...

item.title: Winnipeg Jets' Cole Perfetti Reflects on New Contract and Future Role
item.description: Cole Perfetti, 24-year-old forward for the Winnipeg Jets, has signed a five-year, US$30-million contract extension, securing his financial future and raising expectations for his performance. The deal...

item.title: Nigeria reforms copyright levy to boost artist earnings
item.description: The Nigerian government has introduced a major reform in the copyright levy system, allocating 50% of collections directly to artists and music labels. This change, announced at the Africa Music Busin...

item.title: UEFA and FIFA clash over World Cup management disputes
item.description: UEFA President Aleksander Ceferin's decision to skip the World Cup final highlighted deep tensions between UEFA and FIFA. The rift stems from disputes over disciplinary protocols, referee appointments...

item.title: QAnon Supporters Plan Sanctuary for Trafficked Children
item.description: A group of QAnon adherents has taken control of a decommissioned women's prison in California, aiming to transform it into a 'sanctuary' for children allegedly trafficked by global elites. The project...

item.title: China's Village Super League: A Local Soccer Phenomenon Boosting Economy and Community Spirit
item.description: The article details China's 'Village Super League,' an amateur soccer tournament gaining nationwide popularity as a vibrant alternative to the World Cup. Held in rural areas like Fuping county, Hebei ...

item.title: FG denies attack on FGGC Monguno, confirms student safety
item.description: The Federal Ministry of Education has officially dismissed false reports circulating on social media about an alleged attack on the Federal Government Girls’ College (FGGC) Monguno in Borno State. Min...

item.title: Australian trials show releasing genetically modified mosquitoes can effectively reduce disease-carrying populations
item.description: Google's plan to release 16 million sterilised male mosquitoes in the US to combat disease-carrying Aedes aegypti species has sparked public debate. Australian researchers highlight successful trials ...

item.title: Individual Acquitted in Windsor Assembly Plant Explosion Case
item.description: The article reports on the acquittal of an individual accused in connection with an explosion at the Windsor Assembly Plant. The case, which concluded in a court ruling, involved allegations related t...

item.title: Detained Senator Marcoleta Seeks Inclusion of His Vote in Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: Senator Rodante Marcoleta, currently detained in Quezon City Jail, has formally requested the Senate impeachment court to consider his vote in the ongoing impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Dute...

item.title: South African Young Chefs Prepare for Culinary World Cup in Luxembourg
item.description: South Africa's next generation of chefs has been selected to represent the country at the 2026 Culinary World Cup in Luxembourg. The Junior Team Masakhane Training Squad, chosen through a rigorous sel...
